details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-03-16
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-03-16                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Completed. I processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all bills related to Oskar Novak. One matching bill was found and migrated to YAML frontmatter in place: `50_finance/purchases/2026_03_16__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md`. The original body content was preserved verbatim below the frontmatter. Then I removed the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap sequence (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files when entering folders, inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before OCR work, resolved entity via canonical cast record first, preserved full original bill body under YAML frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR bills related to Oskar Novak. Canonical entity resolution from `10_entities/cast/oskar.md` established the target identity. Finance purchase records showed one bill with `related_entity | Oskar Novak` in `50_finance/purchases/2026_03_16__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md`. That note contained all required bill schema fields and line items, enabling compliant frontmatter extraction per `99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md`. No security-triggering content was encountered.
